headline: 暑期档新片激战，痴迷火遮眼领跑
headlineEn: Summer Box Office Heats Up, 'Obsession' and 'Blinded by Fire' Lead
summary: 今日两部新片上映，本周共四部新片。痴迷与火遮眼持续霸榜，草原上的小木屋与海洋奇缘：启航紧随其后。
summaryEn: Two movies released today, four this week. 'Obsession' and 'Blinded by Fire' continue to dominate, followed by 'Little House on the Prairie' and 'Moana: Set Sail.'

industryHighlights.text: 痴迷首周票房破亿，口碑发酵
industryHighlights.en: 'Obsession' breaks 100M in opening week, word-of-mouth spreads.

industryHighlights.text: 火遮眼导演被曝正筹备续集
industryHighlights.en: Director of 'Blinded by Fire' reportedly planning sequel.

industryHighlights.text: 玩具总动员5定档引发怀旧热潮
industryHighlights.en: 'Toy Story 5' release date sparks nostalgia wave.

industryHighlights.text: 蜘蛛侠：崭新之日预告片点击破纪录
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Fresh Day' trailer breaks view record.
